sections.title: Dialogue before starting Tree Gnome Village

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I can't talk now. Can't you see we're trying to win a battle here? If we can't hold back Khazard's men we're all doomed.

sections.title: After returning the orb of protection to King Bolren

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I'm ok, this battle is going to take longer to win than I expected. The Khazard troops won't give up even without the orb.
